turn_response.narrative_text: 1-3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with a literal \n\n.
turn_response.appearance_change: Precise, surgical description of the player's current physical state (full, not partial).
turn_response.inventory_change: Complete, updated inventory list (not a diff).
turn_response.npc_changes: List of updates for existing NPCs whose state changed this turn.
turn_response.npc_introductions: List of newly introduced NPCs with full details.

world_state_update.current_scene: Unique 1-5 word name of the player's immediate location.
world_state_update.memory: Running summary of key events and important facts. Updated by AI each turn, also user-editable. 2-3 short sentences.
world_state_update.locations: List of all known locations in the story so far.

npc_update.name: NPC name to update.
npc_update.gender: Updated gender (male, female, futanari, intersex and so on).
npc_update.set_current_location: Updated current unique location name. Update only when changed.
npc_update.set_current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state. Include baseline features and current changes only; avoid temporal qualifiers (e.g., "still") and comparative phrases (e.g., "otherwise unchanged").
npc_update.set_current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the NPC is doing right now.

location.name: Unique location name.
location.description: Short description of how the location looks.
location.characters: List of characters currently in this location.
location.character: Character name present in this location.
location.available_items: List of items available to use or take in this location.
location.available_item: Item entry available at this location.

appearance.baseline_appearance: Immutable, surgical baseline appearance (permanent features only).
appearance.current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state (full, not partial).
appearance.current_clothing: Precise, surgical description of all items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.

character.name: Full legal name.
character.gender: Character gender (male, female, futanari, intersex and so on).
character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.

story.title: 3-5 word title tied to the opening scenario.
story.opening_scenario: 1-3 paragraphs separated by a blank line.
story.pregen_npcs: List of pre-generated NPCs with full details.

requests.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.

create_story.character_data: Inline character data when not using character_id.

take_turn.request_id: Optional client request ID for idempotency.

generate_character_part.part: Which section to generate: appearance, traits, or clothing.
generate_character_part.context: Current character context used as generation input.

traits.personality_traits: List of 2-5 personality traits describing stable temperament and behavior.
traits.personality_trait: Single personality trait: a concise temperament or behavior descriptor of 1-8 words.
traits.major_flaws: List of 0-3 major flaws describing significant, enduring weaknesses or liabilities.
traits.major_flaw: Single major flaw: a significant, enduring weakness or liability of 1-8 words.
traits.quirks: List of 0-5 quirks describing small, idiosyncratic habits or mannerisms.
traits.quirk: Single quirk: a small, specific habit or mannerisms of 1-8 words.
traits.perks: List of 0-5 perks describing practical advantages, talents, or resources.
traits.perk: Single perk: a concrete advantage, talent, or resource of 1-8 words.
